ACT 1 ROUTE PLAN (boss: Hexaghost). Floor 6 is a FORCED elite row - every path hits an elite. Taking left route: M-M-M-M-?-ELITE-Rest-ELITE-Treasure-M-Rest-Shop-M-M-Rest. 2 elites with a rest between them, shop at F12 for removal/potions, rest at F15 pre-boss. 4-5 fights before elite 1 satisfies the 3-monster minimum. Ledger: 80/88 now, Burning Blood offsets most early hallway chip; pricing Nob/Lagavulin at 30-35 at A8-tougher. WIN%: 40% (first A9 attempt baseline). WHY: standard start, +8 max HP banked, forced elite row is a risk but rest coverage is good.

events.text: RECALL -- Gremlin Nob, layer:heuristics, enemies/Gremlin Nob

events.reasoning: FIGHT STRATEGY - Gremlin Nob (86HP, A8). TYPE: Hard-scaler variant - skills feed Enrage +2 Str each. WIN CON: pure attack race, ~5 turns of 15-20 dmg with Bash vuln. ZERO DMG PLAN: none - eat Rushes (~14-16), Flame Barrier MAYBE once on a Rush turn (costs +2 Enrage). KEY CARDS: Bash early for vuln, Rampage ramp, Strikes. POTION: Speed Potion likely unused here (block = skills anyway). RISKS: 63 HP vs ~50 unblocked over 5 turns - tight but clears.

HEXAGHOST PLAN. Checklist: Weak source NO, HP 38 (Divider scales with MY hp: only 4x6=24), FB+ passive block YES, Rampage scaling + Burning Pact for Burns PARTIAL. Phase plan: T1 free (Activate) - start Rampage ramp. T2 Divider 24 - block >=24 (Horn Cleat 14 helps). Sears 6-8 (block or eat), Tackles ~12, first Inferno ~30 (A4+ deadlier) - FB+ that turn returns 36 thorns. Blessing of the Forge on a heavy block turn; Liquid Memories to replay Rampage. WIN%: 32% (-13). WHY: entering 250HP boss at 43% HP without Weak; bad F11 misroute cost the shop+rest that would have funded this fight.
